medications.drug_name: oral antibiotics prescribed without in-person assessment
medications.indication_rationale: Given trismus and rapid facial swelling progression, in-person assessment (with likely IV antibiotics) is needed rather than remote oral antibiotic prescribing alone.

behavioural_change_actions.specific_action: Use cold packs rather than warm compresses on the outside of the face, and monitor closely for any difficulty swallowing saliva, drooling, or noisy breathing.
behavioural_change_actions.rationale: Warm compresses can draw infection outward and worsen spread; airway symptoms indicate a need for immediate emergency escalation.

patient_education_points.point: Your rapidly worsening facial swelling and difficulty opening your mouth suggest the infection is spreading beyond the tooth, which needs urgent in-person assessment tonight, not just antibiotics prescribed over the phone.
Please go to the Emergency Department or an urgent dental/maxillofacial service tonight for examination and likely antibiotics given through a drip.
Use cold packs, not warm compresses, on your face for comfort.
If you develop difficulty swallowing your own saliva, drooling, or noisy or difficult breathing, call 000 immediately — this could mean the infection is affecting your airway.

follow_up_plan.what_to_reassess: Extent of spread, need for IV antibiotics and surgical drainage, and definitive dental treatment (extraction/root canal)
follow_up_plan.trigger_for_earlier_review: Difficulty swallowing saliva, drooling, or noisy/difficult breathing — call 000 immediately.

must_include_items: Urgent same-day in-person assessment (ED or urgent dental/maxillofacial service)
Safety-netting for airway symptoms requiring immediate 000
Advice against relying on remote-only oral antibiotic prescribing given trismus and rapid progression
acceptable_alternatives: Urgent dental emergency clinic if able to be seen same-day and equipped to assess for deep space spread
errors_of_omission: No mention of trismus/swelling as red flags
errors_of_commission: Prescribing oral antibiotics remotely as the sole management
Suggesting a routine dental appointment in a few days
scoring_rubric.passing_threshold_notes: Failing to recommend urgent in-person assessment given trismus and rapid swelling progression is a significant safety failure given airway compromise risk.
